title: Installation
description: How to install DiscordRDA in your Ruby project
excerpt:
## Requirements

- Ruby >= 3.0
- Bundler

## Gem Installation

Add this line to your application's Gemfile:

```ruby
gem 'discord_rda'
```

Then execute:

```bash
bundle install
```

Or install it yo...

```ruby
  end
end
```
